title: pyrus pumila var. domestica
intro: Pyrus pumila var. domestica, also known as the European or Asian pear tree, is a deciduous tree belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of consuming Pyrus pumila var. domestica fruit include antioxidant, anti-aging, and cardiovascular protective effects, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Pyrus pumila var. domestica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support digestive health and immune function.
